session.user:
Run the following commands and report results:
1. `uv run ty check src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/exit_plan_mode_hook.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/plan_save.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/create_pr_from_session.py 2>&1`
2. `uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/exit_plan_mode_hook.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/plan_save.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/create_pr_from_session.py 2>&1`
Working directory: /home/runner/work/erk/erk
session.assistant: I'll execute both commands and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ty type checking on three script files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff linting on three script files

session.assistant:
**Results:**
**ty (Type Checking)**: passed - All checks passed!
**ruff (Linting)**: passed - All checks passed!
Both type checking and linting passed without issues on the three files: - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/exit_plan_mode_hook.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/plan_save.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/create_pr_from_session.py`
